login.headline: welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password. Your scripts, products, and routine are waiting.
login.desktopSubtitle: Use the email and password you got at checkout. Everything is exactly where you left it.
login.buyHint: Buy and get your password via email

marketing.description: Personal AI that analyzes products, writes full scripts and organizes your routine — all on mobile.

forgot.subtitleMobile: No worries. Drop your email and we'll send a link to create a new password.
forgot.subtitleSideLeft: In seconds you get a link in your email to create a new password and keep building scripts that sell.
forgot.subtitleSideRight: Drop your account email and we'll send you the link.
forgot.submittingHint: ✦ this can take a few seconds — don't close the page
forgot.successBody: If this email has an account on Método TTS, you'll receive a link in a few seconds to reset your password. Check your inbox (and spam, just in case).

reset.subtitleMobile: Pick a password you'll remember easily — minimum 8 characters.
reset.subtitleSideLeft: Pick a strong password you'll remember. Then you're straight in.
reset.subtitleSideRight: Minimum 8 characters. Then you're straight in the app.
reset.successBody: Your password was updated. Taking you to the app…
reset.errorExpiredBody: This recovery link doesn't work anymore. Request a new one below.

welcome.title: welcome 💕
welcome.subtitle: Before we start, tell us a bit about yourself.
